lines.text: (approaching) Earl. [tired] It's froze solid out there.
Gunny.
Coffee's already going.
[flatly] You slept out here again.
Percolator's ahead of you. [pause] Get yourself a cup.
I asked did you sleep out here.
[flatly] There's a chair by the trainer.
(approaching) That road past the culvert is a sheet of ice, [pause] I come up on it near sideways. Evening, Earl. Gunny.
My defroster quit back in November. [chuckles] I drove the whole way with the window cracked.
Dutch. Stitch. Coffee's on.
All right. Barn's secured, coffee's poured. [pause] We'll open her up.
[deliberate] Apollo Eighteen. Lunar descent rehearsal. Number two thousand, eight hundred and six.
Here.
Present.
Accounted for.
I stayed up Sunday night and watched that landing again. [pause] The whole business. That boy they run the parade for down in Houston.
Computer flew it, Gunny. Flew the approach, found its own spot, and set it down, [pause] and he just had his hands in his lap the whole way.
If you're bringing a case you'll bring it in order. [deliberate] Cricket's the bench, same as he always is.
That's what I'm doing. I'm prosecuting. [pause] Cricket, I want a finding out of you tonight.
Go ahead.
(reading) He had it in hand from four hundred feet. October the ninth. [pause] Says so right there where I wrote it down.
[sarcastic] Four hundred feet. All right, four hundred feet of flying on a landing the box already had finished for him.
Three hundred and eighty. I took it off the loop myself, so we'll use the real one.
See now, that there is about the last little sliver of it, [pause] and they hang a medal on the man and march him down the street.
One man at a time. We hear the figure, then we hear the argument. [deliberate] There's an order to a proceeding, McGrew.
I've heard the figure. [pause] In my court a computer landing doesn't earn a fella a parade. Call that a rule of evidence.
[flatly] There isn't any such rule.
There is now. [chuckles] Entered it just this second.
You can't go entering rules in the middle of your own prosecution.
I'm the prosecutor and the historian both, Gunny, [pause] so I surely can.
Cricket. [pause] Does hand-flying from three hundred and eighty count for the man or don't it.
[flatly] Manual's manual. Count it.
The bench counts it, and I'll tell you it still doesn't come to a whole lot.
Here's my finding. [pause] Not a one of these kids they're decorating would've got past the flight surgeon in our day, and you all know that as well as I do.
That part's true. On the medical alone they'd have washed every one of them out.
[flatly] Is that the finding of this crew, then.
Concur.
Dawes.
[deliberate] Let the record show he concurs.
All right. Cups in the sink. [pause] Mind the cord on the trainer going out.
[deliberate] Net closed. Same time Tuesday.
[quietly] God willing.
